Bash(python3 << 'EOF'
import json

# 读取AI分析结果
with open\('ai_analysis_result.json', 'r'\) as f:
    result = json.load\(f\)

# 提取AI分析报告
ai_content = result['data']['ai_analysis']['content']
model_results = result['data']['model_results']
metadata = result['data']['metadata']

# 保存AI报告为文本文件
with open\('ai_report.txt', 'w', encoding='utf-8'\) as f:
    f.write\("=" * 60 + "\\n"\)
    f.write\("VisionFM AI 智能分析报告\\n"\)
    f.write\("=" * 60 + "\\n\\n"\)
    
    f.write\("【模型检测结果】\\n"\)
    f.write\("-" * 40 + "\\n"\)
    
    # 分类结果
    if 'classification' in model_results:
        cls = model_results['classification']
        f.write\(f"疾病概率: {cls['probability']*100:.1f}%\\n"\)
        f.write\(f"预测类别: {cls['class_label']}\\n"\)
        f.write\(f"置信度: {cls['confidence']*100:.1f}%\\n\\n"\)
    
    # 分割结果
    if 'segmentation' in model_results:
        seg = model_results['segmentation']
        f.write\(f"血管面积比: {seg['vessel_area_ratio']}\\n"\)
        f.write\(f"血管密度: {seg['vessel_density']}\\n"\)
        f.write\(f"血管弯曲度指数: {seg['tortuosity_index']}\\n\\n"\)
    
    f.write\("【AI 分析报告】\\n"\)
    f.write\("-" * 40 + "\\n"\)
    f.write\(ai_content\)
    f.write\("\\n\\n"\)
    
    f.write\("【调用信息】\\n"\)
    f.write\("-" * 40 + "\\n"\)
    f.write\(f"模型: {metadata['ai_analysis']['model_used']}\\n"\)
    f.write\(f"总耗时: {metadata['total_time_ms']}ms\\n"\)
    f.write\(f"Token使用: {metadata['tokens_used']}\\n"\)

print\("AI报告已保存: ai_report.txt"\)

# 提取并保存AI分析返回的图片
import base64
import re

if 'images' in result['data']:
    if 'original' in result['data']['images']:
        orig = result['data']['images']['original']
        orig_b64 = re.sub\(r'^data:image/[^;]+;base64,', '', orig\)
        with open\('ai_original.png', 'wb'\) as f:
            f.write\(base64.b64decode\(orig_b64\)\)
        print\("AI分析原图已保存: ai_original.png"\)
    
    if 'mask' in result['data']['images']:
        mask = result['data']['images']['mask']
        mask_b64 = re.sub\(r'^data:image/[^;]+;base64,', '', mask\)
        with open\('ai_mask.png', 'wb'\) as f:
            f.write\(base64.b64decode\(mask_b64\)\)
        print\("AI分析掩码已保存: ai_mask.png"\)

# 保存完整JSON
with open\('ai_analysis_full.json', 'w', encoding='utf-8'\) as f:
    json.dump\(result, f, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2\)
print\("完整结果已保存: ai_analysis_full.json"\)
EOF)

Bash(python3 << 'EOF'
import json
import base64
import re

# 读取AI分析结果
with open\('ai_analysis_result.json', 'r'\) as f:
    result = json.load\(f\)

data = result['data']

# 提取AI分析报告
ai_content = data['ai_analysis']['content']
model_results = data['model_results']
metadata = data['metadata']

# 保存AI报告为文本文件
with open\('ai_report.txt', 'w', encoding='utf-8'\) as f:
    f.write\("=" * 60 + "\\n"\)
    f.write\("VisionFM AI 智能分析报告\\n"\)
    f.write\("=" * 60 + "\\n\\n"\)
    
    f.write\("【模型检测结果】\\n"\)
    f.write\("-" * 40 + "\\n"\)
    
    # 分类结果
    if 'classification' in model_results:
        cls = model_results['classification']
        f.write\(f"疾病概率: {cls['probability']*100:.1f}%\\n"\)
        f.write\(f"预测类别: {cls['class_label']}\\n"\)
        f.write\(f"置信度: {cls['confidence']*100:.1f}%\\n\\n"\)
    
    # 分割结果
    if 'segmentation' in model_results:
        seg = model_results['segmentation']
        f.write\(f"血管面积比: {seg['vessel_area_ratio']}\\n"\)
        f.write\(f"血管密度: {seg['vessel_density']}\\n"\)
        f.write\(f"血管弯曲度指数: {seg['tortuosity_index']}\\n\\n"\)
    
    f.write\("【AI 分析报告】\\n"\)
    f.write\("-" * 40 + "\\n"\)
    f.write\(ai_content\)
    f.write\("\\n\\n"\)
    
    f.write\("【调用信息】\\n"\)
    f.write\("-" * 40 + "\\n"\)
    f.write\(f"模型: {metadata['ai_analysis']['model_used']}\\n"\)
    f.write\(f"总耗时: {metadata['total_time_ms']}ms\\n"\)
    f.write\(f"Token使用: {metadata['tokens_used']}\\n"\)

print\("AI报告已保存: ai_report.txt"\)

# 提取并保存AI分析返回的图片
if 'images' in data:
    if 'original' in data['images']:
        orig = data['images']['original']
        orig_b64 = re.sub\(r'^data:image/[^;]+;base64,', '', orig\)
        with open\('ai_original.png', 'wb'\) as f:
            f.write\(base64.b64decode\(orig_b64\)\)
        print\("AI分析原图已保存: ai_original.png"\)
    
    if 'mask' in data['images']:
        mask = data['images']['mask']
        mask_b64 = re.sub\(r'^data:image/[^;]+;base64,', '', mask\)
        with open\('ai_mask.png', 'wb'\) as f:
            f.write\(base64.b64decode\(mask_b64\)\)
        print\("AI分析掩码已保存: ai_mask.png"\)

# 保存完整JSON
with open\('ai_analysis_full.json', 'w', encoding='utf-8'\) as f:
    json.dump\(result, f, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2\)
print\("完整结果已保存: ai_analysis_full.json"\)
EOF)

Bash(cd /home/seborid/visonFM_/backend && python3 -c "
import torch
ckpt = torch.load\('checkpoints/seg/checkpoint_108_linear.pth', map_location='cpu', weights_only=False\)
print\('Keys in checkpoint:'\)
print\(list\(ckpt.keys\(\)\)[:20]\)
if 'state_dict' in ckpt:
    print\('\\\\nState dict keys \(first 20\):'\)
    print\(list\(ckpt['state_dict'].keys\(\)\)[:20]\)
")

Bash(cd /home/seborid/visonFM_/backend && conda run -n vfm python3 -c "
import torch
ckpt = torch.load\('checkpoints/seg/checkpoint_108_linear.pth', map_location='cpu', weights_only=False\)
print\('Keys in checkpoint:'\)
print\(list\(ckpt.keys\(\)\)[:20]\)
if 'state_dict' in ckpt:
    print\('\\\\nState dict keys \(first 30\):'\)
    for k in list\(ckpt['state_dict'].keys\(\)\)[:30]:
        print\(k\)
")
